zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey於1260年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞時，她的父親William de Warenne4歲，母親Joan de Vere6歲。她於1153年與Guillaume de Blois結婚。她去世於1295年10月23日享年35歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可列維斯列維斯 聖 多馬 亞特 克利夫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey于1260年出生在英国英格兰素瑞时，她的父亲William de Warenne4岁，母亲Joan de Vere6岁。她于1153年与Guillaume de Blois结婚。她去世于1295年10月23日享年35岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可列維斯列維斯 聖 多馬 亞特 克利夫。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey was born in 1260, in Surrey, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Warenne, was 4 and her mother, Joan de Vere, was 6. She married Guillaume de Blois in 1153. She died on 23 October 1295, at the age of 35, and was buried in Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey est née en 1260, à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Warenne, avait 4 ans et sa mère, Joan de Vere, avait 6 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume de Blois en 1153. Elle est décédée le 23 octobre 1295, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey 1260 in Surrey, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Warenne 4 und ihre Mutter Joan de Vere 6. Sie hat 1153 Guillaume de Blois geheiratet. Sie starb am 23. Oktober 1295 im Alter von 35 Jahren und wurde in Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey è nata il nel 1260 nel Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Warenne, aveva 4 anni e sua madre, Joan de Vere, aveva 6 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume de Blois nel 1153. Morì il 23 ottobre 1295, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey(이)가 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Warenne(은)는 4세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Vere(은)는 6세였다. 그녀는 1153년 Guillaume de Blois(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1295년 10월 23일 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 루스 루스 스트 톰아스 앳 클리프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey nasceu em 1260, em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Warenne, tinha 4 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Vere, tinha 6 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume de Blois em 1153. Ela faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1295, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Lewes St Thomas at Cliffe, Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella de Warenne Countess of Surrey родилась в 1260 г. в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Warenne было 4 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Vere, 6. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume de Blois в 1153 г. Она умерла 23 октября 1295 г. в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности львесь ст томас ат клифф, львесь, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
